items.title: Manchester City celebrate WSL success as Shaw says...
items.summary: Manchester City beat West Ham and celebrated their Women's Super League title, while Bunny Shaw said goodbye with two key goals.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sinner advances to Italian Open final vs. Ruud
items.summary: Jannik Sinner overcame Mother Nature and Daniil Medvedev to advance to Sunday's Italian Open final against Casper Ruud.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England v New Zealand: third women’s cricket one-day international – live
